{{Infobox character
| name = Shuffles
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea
| titles = Bellowing Horror, Elderspawn, lesser Elderspawn, spawn of Othaghor
| abilities = mimics sounds, echo speech, unlatch cages through bars, use words to exert power
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Shuffles Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Shuffles is an [[Elderspawn]] and a descendant of [[Othaghor]]. This small, stout creature stands approximately one foot tall and possesses undersized bat-like wings. Its physical appearance is characterized by black, hateful eyes and a mouth comprised of moving tentacles or tendrils. Shuffles typically spends much of its time sleeping under a blanket in a cage, though it tends to wake when danger is near. It is fed fish by [[Calder]] on a daily basis. The creature is known for its deep, ominous, and often malicious laughter, which can range from quiet chuckles to loud, villainous cackling. Shuffles communicates through a booming, resonant voice that can sound like a malevolent earthquake or the voice of doom. While it frequently speaks, it often repeats what others have said and will continue shouting if ignored. Its behavior is driven by hunger, boredom, or the perception of lethal danger to the crew, though its assessments of danger are not always accurate. Shuffles has a habit of landing on [[Calder]], often perching on his head or shoulder.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Shuffles is a [[Bellowing Horror]] characterized by black eyes, stubby wings that buzz like a hummingbird's, and a mouth consisting of a nest of tentacles. This creature lives alongside [[Calder]], spending most of the day sleeping in a darkened cage where it occasionally talks in its sleep and eats worms. A capable flyer, the monstrosity can mimic sounds, echo speech, and repeat the words of others. Shuffles is known to growl with a voice like a malevolent earthquake and possesses a deep, masculine laugh. Ultimately, the creature follows [[Calder]] by flapping along behind him.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] is a dark figure with black eyes and stubby wings.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] has a nest of tentacles on its mouth.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] is a [[Bellowing Horror]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] is a creature kept in a darkened cage that can talk in its sleep.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] is a creature with black eyes and tentacles.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] is a creature with tentacles that eats worms.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] is a creature that mostly sleeps during the day.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] are creatures that live alongside [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] is a creature that can fly and mimics sounds.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] can fly and echo speech.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] has wings that buzz like a hummingbird's.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] can growl with the voice of a malevolent earthquake.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] is a monstrosity with wings, tentacles for a mouth, and eyes that glare black hate.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] has a deep and masculine laugh.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] is a creature with a tentacle-mouth and wings.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] is a creature that repeats what others say.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shuffles]] follows [[Calder]] and flaps along behind him.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Shuffles is a pudgy green [[Elderspawn]] with bat-like wings that [[Calder]] has kept as a pet since childhood. Though this lesser species is characterized by low intelligence, Shuffles possesses a deep, booming masculine voice and often joins in with rumbling laughter. The creature is known to laugh whenever danger is imminent, though it was once seen simply gnawing on a fishbone while in the rigging.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shuffles]] is a creature that lives in a cage and laughs when danger is imminent.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] received [[Shuffles]] as a pet when he was a child.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shuffles]] is an [[Elderspawn]] with a bat-winged shape that interacts with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shuffles]] was gnawing on a fishbone in the rigging.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shuffles]] is an [[Elderspawn]] with a deep, booming voice.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shuffles]] joins in with rumbling laughter.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shuffles]] are lesser [[Elderspawn]] with little intelligence.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shuffles]] is a pudgy green monster that can speak in a resonant masculine voice.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A spawn of [[Othaghor]], Shuffles is a winged creature with tendrils that frequently rests upon [[Calder]]'s shoulder. This speaking entity possesses the ability to use words to exert power and does not experience time in the same manner as humans. During various encounters, Shuffles has been known to slap, shout into [[Calder]]'s ear, and bellow warnings. Beyond its vocal capabilities, the creature can scream and has demonstrated the dexterity to unlatch cages through their bars.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] is a creature with leathery wings and tendrils that rests on [[Calder]]'s shoulder.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] fluttered down to land on [[Calder]]'s shoulder.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] is a spawn of [[Othaghor]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] is a creature that appears to [[Calder]] and can speak.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] is a character who can shout and slap [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] shouted in [[Calder]]’s ear.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] is a character who bellowed 'TOO LATE'.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] rides on the railing and has wings.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] is a creature that landed on [[Calder]]'s shoulder and screams.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] is a creature that does not feel time like humans.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] has the ability to unlatch cages through bars.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shuffles]] can use words to exert power.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Inside its darkened cage in the corner, Shuffles murmured, “Kill for it....”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Shuffles leaned closer to Calder’s ear, growling with the voice of a malevolent earthquake: “EEEAAAATTT.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|"SCARED," Shuffles bellowed, and Calder remembered the drawbacks that came with his enhanced hearing.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“OURS!” Shuffles shouted in Calder’s ear.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|With a flapping of leather, a weight landed on Calder's shoulder. "GAVE UP," Shuffles screamed into his ear.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
